tldr_zh: OpenAI發布GPT-5.6 Sol、Anthropic獲准釋放Mythos模型、美伊局勢升溫；科技巨頭自建芯片挑戰NVIDIA壟斷。
tldr_en: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, Anthropic releases Mythos to trusted partners, US-Iran tensions escalate; tech giants build custom chips to challenge NVIDIA.

items.title_zh: OpenAI發布GPT-5.6 Sol，具備編碼與網安強化能力
items.title_en: OpenAI Previews GPT-5.6 Sol with Advanced Capabilities in Coding and Cybersecurity
items.summary_zh: OpenAI推出下一代模型GPT-5.6 Sol，在編碼、科學和網路安全領域具有更強能力，並搭載其最先進的安全堆棧。該模型發布後因政府要求而限制推出，OpenAI強調此類政府管制不應成為常態。
items.summary_en: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, its next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack. The rollout is limited following government request, with OpenAI stating such restrictions shouldn't become standard.

items.title_zh: 美國允許Anthropic向可信合作夥伴釋放Mythos模型
items.title_en: US Approves Anthropic to Release Mythos Model to Trusted Partners
items.summary_zh: 美國政府允許Anthropic公司向精選的美國企業釋放其最新Mythos模型，此舉標誌著AI監管框架下的有條件開放。該模型的釋放受到嚴格審查程序限制。
items.summary_en: US government approves Anthropic to release its Mythos model to selected US companies, marking conditional access under AI oversight framework. The release follows strict vetting procedures to ensure responsible deployment.

items.title_zh: 開源與閉源LLM差距擴大，頂級模型能力兩極分化
items.title_en: Growing Gap Between Open-Source and Closed-Source Large Language Models
items.summary_zh: 研究顯示開源語言模型與閉源商用模型之間的性能差距持續擴大，頂級閉源模型持續領先。這反映AI市場的集中化趨勢，也引發關於AI民主化的討論。
items.summary_en: Analysis reveals widening performance gap between open-source and closed-source LLMs, with leading proprietary models maintaining significant advantages. The trend raises concerns about AI democratization and market concentration.

items.title_zh: OpenAI自主設計Jalapeño推理芯片，挑戰NVIDIA芯片壟斷
items.title_en: OpenAI Builds Custom Jalapeño Inference Chip to Challenge NVIDIA Dominance
items.summary_zh: OpenAI與Broadcom合作開發Jalapeño自製推理芯片，加入Google、Apple和SpaceX等企業自建芯片行列，旨在打破對NVIDIA單一供應商的依賴。此舉標誌著AI芯片市場從NVIDIA壟斷走向多元化。
items.summary_en: OpenAI partners with Broadcom to develop custom Jalapeño inference chip, joining Google, Apple, and SpaceX in building proprietary chips to reduce NVIDIA dependency. This marks a shift away from single-supplier concentration in AI hardware.

items.title_zh: Netflix強制綁定電郵地址，結束多帳户登入共享時代
items.title_en: Netflix Requires Unique Email for Each User Profile, Ending Password Sharing Era
items.summary_zh: Netflix自6月15日起要求每個使用者檔案綁定唯一電郵地址，全面禁止登入資訊共享。此舉旨在遏制密碼共享，提高營收，標誌著流媒體服務商共享策略的重大轉變。
items.summary_en: Netflix mandates unique email addresses for each user profile starting June 15, eliminating login credential sharing. This policy aims to curb password sharing and boost revenue, marking a major shift in streaming service strategies.

items.title_zh: 俄羅斯黑客被指控對捷豹路虎發動25億美元攻擊
items.title_en: Russian Hackers Accused of $2.5B Jaguar Land Rover Cyberattack
items.summary_zh: 報告指控俄羅斯駭客集團應對去年對汽車製造商捷豹路虎的網路攻擊負責，造成25億美元損失。該攻擊是近年來最具破壞性和代價最高的網路安全事件之一。
items.summary_en: Report attributes the $2.5 billion cyberattack on Jaguar Land Rover to Russian hackers, making it one of the most costly and disruptive hacks in recent years. The incident highlights vulnerabilities in critical automotive infrastructure.

items.title_zh: 加州推首款AI失業追蹤器，監測人工智慧就業衝擊
items.title_en: California Launches First AI Unemployment Tracker to Monitor Job Displacement
items.summary_zh: 加州州長Newsom推出全美首個AI失業追蹤器(CAIT)，透過分析失業保險申請數據監測AI對勞動市場的影響。初步報告顯示AI尚未引發大規模失業，但灣區部分高科技職業已現失業增加跡象。
items.summary_en: California Governor Newsom launches nation's first AI Unemployment Tracker (CAIT) to analyze AI's impact on labor market using jobless claims data. Initial report shows no mass unemployment yet, but emerging job loss signals in Bay Area tech sectors.

items.title_zh: 史丹佛AI年度報告：模型考試接近滿分，下個戰場是Agent執行任務
items.title_en: Stanford Annual AI Report: LLMs Near Perfect Exam Scores, Focus Shifts to Agent Task Completion
items.summary_zh: 史丹佛大學年度AI報告顯示，大型語言模型在各類考試中的表現已接近滿分，競爭焦點轉向AI Agent能否獨立完成現實任務。該報告反映AI發展重心從純模型性能轉向實際應用能力。
items.summary_en: Stanford's annual AI report shows LLMs achieving near-perfect exam scores, with competitive focus shifting to whether AI Agents can independently complete real-world tasks. This marks transition from pure model benchmarks to practical capability evaluation.

items.title_zh: 加州禁止串流平台播放刺耳廣告，7月1日起生效
items.title_en: California Bans Excessively Loud Ads on Streaming Services Starting July 1
items.summary_zh: 加州立法禁止串流平台播放過度刺耳的廣告，新法將於7月1日生效。伊利諾州已先行通過類似法律，使串流服務商更有動機降低廣告音量。
items.summary_en: California law banning excessively loud streaming ads takes effect July 1, with Illinois having passed similar legislation. Streaming services face incentive to reduce ad volume across platforms.

items.title_zh: 俄羅斯要求民眾改用安卓，抗議蘋果下架俄國應用程式
items.title_en: Russia Urges Citizens to Switch to Android as Apple Blocks Russian Apps
items.summary_zh: 蘋果下架俄羅斯重要應用程式後，俄羅斯政府公開批評蘋果的決定，呼籲民眾改用安卓系統。此舉反映中美科技對抗背景下，國家與科技巨頭間的緊張關係升級。
items.summary_en: Russian government urges citizens to switch to Android after Apple removes key Russian apps, criticizing Apple's decisions as 'bizarre.' The escalation reflects rising tensions between nation-states and Big Tech companies.

items.title_zh: 美伊局勢升溫：美軍回擊伊朗攻擊，打擊無人機與飛彈設施
items.title_en: US Strikes Iranian Missile and Drone Facilities in Response to Cargo Ship Attack
items.summary_zh: 美國軍隊對伊朗無人機襲擊荷莫茲海峽貨輪作出回應，出動軍機攻擊伊朗飛彈與無人機儲存設施及沿海雷達站。此舉加劇美伊緊張局勢，儘管雙方已簽署停火備忘錄。
items.summary_en: US military strikes Iranian missile and drone storage facilities, coastal radar positions in response to drone attack on cargo ship in Strait of Hormuz. Escalation occurs despite recent ceasefire agreement between nations.

items.title_zh: 川普威脅100%關稅反制數位稅，刺激美歐貿易紛爭升溫
items.title_en: Trump Threatens 100% Tariffs on European Digital Services Tax in Trade Escalation
items.summary_zh: 美國總統川普放話，任何課徵數位服務稅的國家將面臨100%關稅反制。此舉標誌著美國對歐洲科技稅收政策的強烈不滿，預期將進一步激化貿易衝突。
items.summary_en: President Trump threatens 100% tariffs on countries imposing digital services taxes, marking sharp escalation in US-Europe tech tax dispute. Warning signals intensified trade conflict ahead.
